Module com.example.escriturarapida
Package com.example.escriturarapida.model

Interface IGameModel

All Known Implementing Classes:
GameModelAdapter
public interface IGameModel
Interface that defines the contract for the game's business logic. Any class implementing this interface must provide word management, validation, feedback messages, and game state persistence.
Since:
2026
Version:
1.0
Author:
Paulo Esteban OrdoÃ±ez GutiÃ©rrez

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getRandomNegativeMessage()
    Returns a randomly selected negative feedback message.
    String
    getRandomPositiveMessage()
    Returns a randomly selected positive feedback message.
    void
    loadWords()
    Loads the full word list into memory and shuffles it randomly.
    String
    randomSelect()
    Returns a randomly selected word from the current word list.
    void
    removeWord(String word)
    Removes a word from the active word list after it has been correctly answered.
    void
    resetData()
    Resets all game state back to zero.
    void

    Saves the current game state for use across scenes.
    boolean
    validateWord(String written, String word)
    Validates whether the typed word matches the target word.

  • Method Details

    • loadWords

      void loadWords()
      Loads the full word list into memory and shuffles it randomly. Must be called before any word selection is attempted.

    • randomSelect

      String randomSelect()
      Returns a randomly selected word from the current word list.
      Returns:
      a random word from the list.

    • validateWord

      boolean validateWord(String written, String word)
      Validates whether the typed word matches the target word. Comparison is case-insensitive and ignores leading/trailing whitespace.
      Parameters:
      written - the word typed by the player.
      word - the target word displayed on screen.
      Returns:
      true if the words match, false otherwise.

    • removeWord

      void removeWord(String word)
      Removes a word from the active word list after it has been correctly answered.
      Parameters:
      word - the word to remove from the list.

    • saveData

      void saveData(int level, int seconds, int milliseconds)
      Saves the current game state for use across scenes.
      Parameters:
      level - the current player level.
      seconds - the remaining seconds when the game ended.
      milliseconds - the remaining milliseconds when the game ended.

    • resetData

      void resetData()
      Resets all game state back to zero. Called when the player restarts or exits to the start screen.

    • getRandomPositiveMessage

      String getRandomPositiveMessage()
      Returns a randomly selected positive feedback message.
      Returns:
      a random positive message string.

    • getRandomNegativeMessage

      String getRandomNegativeMessage()
      Returns a randomly selected negative feedback message.
      Returns:
      a random negative message string.
